text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, November 02. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
